userdoc.notice: A tamper-proof time capsule of promises to your future self.         Each promise stores an off-chain content URI (IPFS) plus an unlock         time, owned by the wallet that sealed it. No funds are held — this         contract only records, so there is no value to lose and no complex         settlement logic to go wrong.
